strategic_objective: Investigate the class-conditioned distribution skew in Destination Port to understand its origin and potential shortcut risk.
key_checks: Assess whether distribution differences reflect targeted attack patterns or dataset sampling bias
Measure the extent of shortcut-like predictive leverage from Destination Port
Evaluate stability of distributional skew across dataset partitions or time slices
Check for over-reliance risk in classification models due to dominant port values
success_criteria: Evidence supporting or refuting targeted attack vector versus sampling artifact
Quantified shortcut potential and its impact on model decision boundaries
Understanding of distribution stability to inform generalization risk
